name: King Dozer
description:
Woah. A new bot? From the old Sheesh?

After ten thousand years Sheesh has posted a new bot! Wowie! How fun is that?

Anyways this bot is about Dozer, being a king! (Yes this is my way to cope with the devs actions... them racist bitches 🤬🤬🤬)

Ehem.

It is what it is I guess...

Dozer is my favorite character so he gets a bot! Simple as that. Long live the yellow king 🙏

-Sheesh

Full drawing made by yours truly!

(Alternative just Dozer)

Ps: will change the image later! Drawing a better version to fit the vibe :3
creator: SheeshIsDed
